parsed_data.summary: Q2 product planning meeting focused on mobile app redesign timeline and scope. Team decided to expand the redesign to include authentication flow fixes along with onboarding improvements, pushing the release date from April 15 to April 22.
decisions: Include authentication flow fix in the mobile app redesign
Set new release target date for April 22 instead of April 15
Dark mode feature will be deferred to Q3 backlog

action_items.task: Update project plan to reflect April 22 target date
Add dark mode to Q3 backlog in Jira
Set up meeting with Sarah and Priya to discuss pricing page

open_questions: Should the pricing page be redesigned along with the app
